Current time: Tuesday, March 10th, 2026 — 8:24 PM (America/New_York)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

But I need to be honest here. I don't have active Forge or Scholar sessions running right now that I can check. Let me see what's actually happening - let me check for any active sessions and the current state.
